scripts.build: pnpm --filter @web-tools/toolkit run build && pnpm --filter @web-tools/api run build && pnpm --filter @web-tools/cli run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @web-tools/toolkit run test && pnpm --filter @web-tools/api run test && pnpm --filter @web-tools/cli run test && pnpm run test:searxng
